meaning: vt.重新比赛,重新表演,重放n.重赛
examples: We watched a replay of the wedding on video.
I watched a slow-motion videotape replay of his fall.
If there has to be a replay we are confident of victory.
That would simply set up a replay of the global inflation of the 1970s.
Even if implemented, instant replay will never take the heartbeat out of the game.
